  // MARK: - Map Protocol
  protocol Map {
    associatedtype Key: Hashable
    associatedtype Value

    func copy() -> Self
    func get(_ key: Key) -> Value?
    func getOrDefault(_ key: Key) -> Value?
    func getOrElse(_ key: Key, elseValue: Value) -> Value
    func keys() -> [Key]
    mutating func put(_ key: Key, value: Value)
    mutating func remove(_ key: Key)
    func size() -> Int
  }

  // MARK: - LinkedHashMap Class
  class LinkedHashMap<Key: Hashable, Value>: Map {
    private var dict: [Key: Value] = [:]
    private var listKey: [Key] = []

    init() {}

    init(copy: LinkedHashMap<Key, Value>) {
      for key in copy.keys() {
        if let value = copy.getOrDefault(key) {
          self.put(key, value: value)
        }
      }
    }

    func copy() -> LinkedHashMap<Key, Value> {
      return LinkedHashMap(copy: self)
    }

    func get(_ key: Key) -> Value? {
      return dict[key]
    }

    func getOrDefault(_ key: Key) -> Value? {
      return dict[key]
    }

    func getOrElse(_ key: Key, elseValue: Value) -> Value {
      return dict[key] ?? elseValue
    }

    func keys() -> [Key] {
      return listKey
    }

    func put(_ key: Key, value: Value) {
      dict[key] = value
      if !listKey.contains(key) {
        listKey.append(key)
      }
    }

    func remove(_ key: Key) {
      dict.removeValue(forKey: key)
      if let index = listKey.firstIndex(of: key) {
        listKey.remove(at: index)
      }
    }

    func size() -> Int {
      return dict.count
    }
  }

  // MARK: - KeyValue Class
  class KeyValue<T> {
    var key: String = ""
    var value: T?

    init(key: String = "", value: T? = nil) {
      self.key = key
      self.value = value
    }
  }

  // MARK: - Utility Functions
  func hashmapFromKeyValues<T>(_ keyValues: KeyValue<T>...) -> LinkedHashMap<String, T> {
    let map = LinkedHashMap<String, T>()
    for kv in keyValues {
      if let value = kv.value {
        map.put(kv.key, value: value)
      }
    }
    return map
  }

  func keyValueFromKeyValue<T>(_ key: String, _ value: T) -> KeyValue<T> {
    return KeyValue(key: key, value: value)
  }

  func vx_issame(_ val1 : Any, _ val1 : Any) -> Bool {
    return ObjectIdentifier(val1) == ObjectIdentifier(val2)
  }
